corpus_note: Three Greek lemmas from disjoint NT regions: Johannine (logos, G3056), Pauline (pistis, G4102), Synoptic (agapos, G26). Each row exercises a distinct Decision 13 field-nullability axis: row 1 all required fields populated, row 2 english=null (occ 0.991 gap), row 3 lsj_definition=null (occ 0.896 gap).

rows.lsj_definition: the word by which the inward thought is expressed; also the inward thought itself
